questionHtml: Draw the structure of the conjugate base of benzoic acid showing all the atoms and all the bonds.
markschemeHtml:
[✔]

 

Note: Accept Kekulé structures.

Negative sign must be shown in correct position- on the O or delocalised over the carboxylate.

meta.title: Draw the structure of the conjugate base of benzoic acid showing all the atoms and all the bonds.
